case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR VS. CHI IEONG KONG

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT KONG, CHI IEONG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-12-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $46.05 SERVED OCT-19-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KONG, CHI IEONG

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KONG, CHI IEONG $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $46.05 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,046.05 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 12/17/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-12-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-12-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLECTOR IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY WAH-MEI LEW. DEFENDANT CHI IEONG KONG IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-12-2019 - JUDGMENT.
